question: Paul argues that the resurrection of Jesus is essential. What does he say about believers’ condition if Christ has not been raised?

choices.A: Their faith is futile and they are still in their sins
choices.B: They are saved anyway but miss rewards
choices.C: They should return to the Mosaic sacrifices
choices.D: They should stop preaching but keep praying

teaching.title: Resurrection and faith
teaching.body: Paul states that if Christ has not been raised, faith is futile and believers are still in their sins.
